name: The fluffy fluff god of floof
description:
Hey there!

So this was a interesting request to make. While I don't normally make bots where the user is not the one to transform, I am not closed off to the idea, so here we are!

In this one, you get to help a new god learn to be a god, even though you don't really have the experience. Have fun!

Request by: Sable_Falls
creator: RutaRune
